section.div: Fit File Viewer - Cross-Platform application to analyze Fit files. Builds available for Windows, Mac, and Linux in a variety of formats.
Uptime Watcher - Cross-Platform GUI-based application to monitor uptime. Builds available for Windows, Mac, and Linux in a variety of formats.
PS Color Scripts Enhanced w/ Caching and Cross-Platform PowerShell Support
TypeScript library for validating DNS query results and individual DNS records. Supports traditional DNS records (A, AAAA, MX, TXT, etc.) and DNSSEC records (DNSKEY, DS, RRSIG, NSEC, etc.)
Auto-chunking ESLint runner that updates cache incrementally based on your ESLint config.
Prettier Plugin to Format Powershell scripts. Supports ".ps1", ".psm1", and ".psd1" file types.
Collection of UserStyles and UserScripts made by Typpi
Repo for a custom OhMyPosh config inspired by AtomicBit
Brawlhalla Bot / Gold Farmer and Powerleveling for Brawlhalla. AFK farms gold and XP for any or every Brawlhalla legend.
A visual tool for inspecting and understanding your Stylelint Configs
Repo for my Sauce4Zwift Mods.. Feel free to use...
Allows the creation of bank tags from categories on the offical OSRS wiki

Bank Highlighter, inspired by RuneLite's "Inventory Tags," lets you color-code items in your bank or inventory (while the bank is open) for easier visibility. This feature is particularly useful for organizing skill/combat gear sets and quickly finding the items you need.
A GitHub CLI extension to clean up old, failed, canceled, etc workflow runs.
ESLint plugin to disable all mutation in JavaScript and Typescript... 2
ESLint plugin focused on encouraging consistent usage of "type-fest" and "ts-extras"
ESLint plugin to integrate Stylelint formatting + additional rules!
A GitHub CLI extension to clean up old, failed, canceled, etc workflow runs.
Next generation testing framework powered by Vite.
A public leaderboard tracking all-time commit contributions across GitHub
ESLint plugin to enforce best Docusaurus config setup and practices... 2
Easy to maintain open source documentation websites.
Terminal session recorder, streamer and player
